Off Calendar Nov-07-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-01-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

The unopposed Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Court Reporter: Bailiff: Not Present. (301/RCE)

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-11-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. The moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers per SF Local Rule 2.7B.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RCE)
